text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's the holidays.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And today, Maruzensky is holding a party for the
younger students.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Maruzen! Thank you so much for preparing such a
wonderful party!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Heehee! Are you enjoying yourself?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Totally! Not only is it fun, but the food is great
too!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
You just keep eating nonstop, Spe! Aren't you
worried about training tomorrow?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
It's okay! From the moment the party started, I'd
already resigned myself to my fate!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I don't see how that makes it okay, but sure...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, c'mon, it'd be a waste not to enjoy ourselves
at a party!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
The best thing to do is have fun and eat all the
goodies we can! Forget about the rest!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Yes... You're right! It would be rude to restrain
oneself.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
So get eating, King! We can cry on the scale
tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Sky, are you sure your idea of a party isn't poking
fun at me?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hehehe, what a wonderful day we're having. ♪

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Thank you so much for today, Maruzensky!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
You're welcome! ♪ I'm so happy everyone is
having fun!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Right, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Right, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A few days earlier...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Thanks for helping me carry everything, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Thanks for helping me carry everything, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Now we're all set to raise the roof with the
younger students.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Heehee! I can't wait to see everyone's happy
faces!
choice_data_list:
You're always so considerate of the newer
students.

You're always so considerate of the newer
students.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: It's because they're all so cute!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I just want to watch over them, you know? I want
to see them happy and healthy.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Don't you know the saying? "Even naughty kids
deserve to grow up strong!"
choice_data_list: I don't think I've ever heard that one...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Huh? My mom says it all the time...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, I want to reward all of them for working
so hard this year!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: So I hope you'll help me see it through!
choice_data_list: Right, let's make it a blast!
Right, let's make it a blast!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Yeah! It's going to be off the hook!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, I'm so happy to have fun with everyone
like this!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: You and your trainer are like our Santa Clauses!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Teehee, that's right!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to give presents to all you good little
ponies! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Now come on, let's party to the max!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Okay! I'm gonna stuff myself silly!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I had the best time! ♪ Thanks for all your help,
Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I had the best time! ♪ Thanks for all your help,
Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
All right, I've given out presents, so now it's time
for Santa to return to the North Pole! ♪
choice_data_list: Shouldn't you get a gift too?
Shouldn't you get a gift too?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
As long as everyone is happy, that's all that
matters to me!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Besides, do I look like the type to be excited
about getting presents?
choice_data_list:
But you've been good too, so I want to give you
something!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Wow! You really want to give me a present,
Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Wow! You really want to give me a present,
Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Heehee! So I guess that makes you my Santa
Claus, huh?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Heehee! So I guess that makes you my Santa
Claus, huh?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
It'd be rude not to accept, so I guess I'll let you
spoil me a little!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Now, what gift would I like... How about going for
a drive with me?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, our exciting party continues.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Maruzensky, you've been good too, y'know!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Me?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I mean, you prepared this whole party for us,
right?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
So that's why I want to give you a gift too! What
would you like?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: It's fine, really! I'm the oldest here, so...
choice_data_list: Oh c'mon, just accept the present.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Well, if even you say so...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Well, if even you say so...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh, I've got it! What if I'm your present?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
My gift is to keep being your running
competition!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
And I'll continue running with you as well, just like
Spe! ♪

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: No fair! I can't let you guys have all the fun!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I'll be your racing partner too, Maruzen!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Naturally, I'll accept the challenge as well!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...So that's where this is going, huh?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Well... I guess all of us together might actually
make for one heck of a race...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Starting with Special Week, all of the younger
students then volunteer to be running partners
with Maruzensky.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe, I guess everyone is my Santa Claus, today!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Okay, I accept all of your wonderful gifts!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: So come and get me, everyone!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thus, the holiday party ends with smiles all
around.
